_comment: Branding pattern map for upstream sync. Maps upstream strings to fork strings. Mechanical conflicts matching these patterns are auto-resolved.
_instructions: Apply replacements in order. More specific patterns before general ones. Do NOT apply gsd-tools filename patterns during batches 1-11; apply after batch 12 only.

path_patterns.scope: directory paths, workflow references, agent references
path_patterns.note: Replaces the installed skill directory name in all ~/.claude/get-shit-done/... references

npm_patterns.scope: npm package name in install commands, README badges, check-update.js
install command in README and workflows

author_patterns.note: Only in package.json — do not replace author name in README testimonials or commit messages

do_not_replace.reason: This is an upstream heading — fork replaces with GET STUFF DONE in README, but only in the title line, not in testimonials
Testimonial quote — fork can keep or replace with 'gets stuff done', discretionary
Author credit appears in README and commit messages — keep as attribution except in package.json author field
DO NOT replace with gsd-tools.js — the fork adopts the .cjs extension. This is NOT a branding change.
SECURITY.md contact — leave as upstream email, not fork responsibility

post_module_split_only.scope: ALL references in agents, commands, workflows after batch 12
post_module_split_only.note: Only apply after Batch 12 (module split). During batches 1-11, fork file is still .js
post_module_split_only.count: 48 reference sites across agents/, commands/, get-stuff-done/

package_json_protected_fields.note: package.json is a protected file. After any cherry-pick that modifies it, restore these fields:

always_preserve.name: @chude/get-stuff-done
always_preserve.author: Chude (fork), TACHES (original)
always_preserve.devDependencies: keep fork's: esbuild, eslint, eslint-plugin-security, sharp, svgexport

safe_to_adopt_from_upstream.keywords: can add gemini, gemini-cli if desired
safe_to_adopt_from_upstream.engines: upstream lowered to node>=16.7.0; fork keeps >=20.0.0
safe_to_adopt_from_upstream.new_script_entries: upstream added build:hooks — safe to adopt as it references scripts/build-hooks.js
